svg.title: Multi-agent technical document reader architecture
svg.desc: Shows how the FastAPI SSE endpoint feeds into a Primary Assistant that adaptively routes to one of three paths: direct reply, single-agent (examination or summary), or a three-step agent chain (parser, relation, explanation). Shared resources include FAISS vector store, learning store, web search with Tavily-to-DuckDuckGo fallback, and Redis checkpointer.
